steps.title: Identify the exemplification signal
steps.content: The first sentence states a general principle: sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic than bulkier ones. The second sentence then presents a specific case: the Airbus A350 with its streamlined nose. The transition must signal that this specific example illustrates the general principle.

steps.title: Apply the exemplification logic
steps.content: For example introduces the A350's streamlined nose as a concrete instance of why sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic, showing how its design helps it glide through wind. Meanwhile suggests simultaneity, however signals contradiction, and additionally implies adding a separate point—none establish the exemplification relationship this sentence requires. That matches choice D — D is correct.
